theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 2 (Performance Pro) merged with Archetype 5 (Luxury Dark)
theme_and_archetype.vibe: Premium, edgy, courtside energy, professional analytics (Action Network / DraftKings caliber). High visual tension, strictly no purple/violet/teal.

typography.rules: Distinctive, professional, readable hierarchy for data-heavy interfaces. NO Inter, NO Roboto, NO Space Grotesk.

fonts.headings: Clash Display or Cabinet Grotesk (Premium, edgy, slightly wide)
fonts.body: Manrope or Chivo (Crisp, highly readable for numbers and dense data)
fonts.data_numbers: Teko or Anton (Used sparingly for massive scorelines, odds, or win percentages)

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl tracking-tighter font-black uppercase text-white

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Mode B (Control Room Grid). Dense, compact data displays. 1px borders to separate dense stats. Pure HTML/Tailwind for the landing page to break grids with aggressive asymmetry.
spacing_and_layout.containers: Use glassmorphism selectively for sticky headers and modal overlays (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0A0B]/80 border-b border-white/10).
spacing_and_layout.cards: Sharp edges or max 8px border-radius (`rounded-lg`). Flat solid surface, 1px inner border. Heavy use of tabular data alignment.
spacing_and_layout.spacing_scale: Marketing: Generous spacing (py-24, gap-12). Dashboard: Compact and exact (p-4, gap-4) for scanning data.

components.strategy: Hybrid Approach: Radix/Shadcn UI for complex interactives (Dropdowns, Tabs, Tables). Raw Tailwind HTML for marketing hero and prediction detail cards.
components.buttons: Primary CTA: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-[#DC2626]. Must have explicitly defined text colors on hover.
components.tables: Shadcn Table heavily customized. Tabular numbers. Highlight winning odds in `text-emerald-400`.
components.charts: Recharts. Use dark theme tooltips, transparent grid lines (stroke-white/5), and brand colors for lines/bars (#FF3B30 for ROI, #10B981 for Accuracy).
components.live_scoreboard: Horizontal scrolling marquee or bento grid. Must feature team logos (use standard lucide icons if no images provided), live pulsing dot, and period/quarter.
components.win_bars: Custom Tailwind progress bars (`h-2 rounded-full`) using green/red gradients for Over/Under or Spread probabilities.

motion.page_transitions: framer-motion for smooth fade-ins. Staggered list animations for today's predictions.
motion.live_indicators: Pulsing red dot (animate-pulse) for Live Games.

accessibility.contrast: Strict APCA/WCAG AA adherence. NO dark-on-dark text. Must test pure white text on `#FF3B30` and `#10B981` buttons.

hero_backgrounds.description: Dramatic spotlight on a basketball hoop in a dark gym. Use as the main marketing hero background with bg-black/60 overlay.
Basketball dunk action. Use in the 'Premium Picks' marketing section.

user_avatars.description: User headshot for testimonials or profile page.
Edgy black and white male portrait for premium user showcase.

sponsor_logos.description: Abstract badge image to use as a placeholder for data partners/sponsors (apply grayscale and brightness to blend into background).

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building 'CourtVision AI', a hybrid fullstack sportsbook application.
Follow the Mode B Control Room Grid for the main dashboard. It must feel like a dense, professional analytics tool.
Implement Recharts for Performance Tracking (ROI, Accuracy by League).
Include specific prediction features: Win % progress bars, over/under, and 4 distinct Confidence Badges (90-95, 85-89, 80-84, 75-79).
Include a 'Best Value Bet' and 'Safest Pick' UI treatment.
Add the legal disclaimer 'Predictions are statistical estimates and not guaranteed outcomes' in the global footer.
Strictly use the colors defined in this JSON. Do NOT invent new purple, teal, or generic SaaS blue colors.
Use Manrope or Chivo for all dashboard numbers/tables to ensure clear tabular data alignment.
In all React files (.jsx or .js), ensure comprehensive coverage of `data-testid` properties.
Use the provided image URLs exclusively for media sections. Do not use generic placeholder image URLs.
